query:
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.gradeId, n.subjectId, n.semesterId, n.categoryId, g.name as gradeName, s.name as subjectName 
FROM notebooks n 
LEFT JOIN grades g ON n.gradeId = g.id 
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON n.subjectId = s.id 
WHERE n.fileUrl IS NOT NULL 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ocoPq9UKt9MVUJb.root --database cF5vY7QXosm6HAcTf29xyM --execute SELECT n.id, n.title, n.gradeId, n.subjectId, n.semesterId, n.categoryId, g.name as gradeName, s.name as subjectName 
FROM notebooks n 
LEFT JOIN grades g ON n.gradeId = g.id 
LEFT JOIN subjects s ON n.subjectId = s.id 
WHERE n.fileUrl IS NOT NULL 
LIMIT 5;
